codeReview.summary: The implementation fully meets the requirements for the product CRUD endpoints. It correctly adds GTIN validation, generated DIDs and digital links, handles duplicate detection with 409 responses, correctly implements RBAC and brand scoping logic, adds the requested schema changes and implements pagination. Comprehensive unit testing was added to verify success, failure and edge cases.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker noticed that vitest 4.x does not support the `--testPathPattern` flag which is mentioned in the backend-worker skill procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Noted in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges of the handoff file.

summary: Review complete. The product CRUD implementation perfectly matches the requirements, correctly utilizing the transaction block, role-based access controls, new database schema fields, and shared library tools. All new unit tests pass and test cases cover all defined expected behaviors.
